properties.description: This dataset contains EarthCARE cloud properties (microphysical variables and cloud morphology) along with ERA-5 driven wind trajectories and cloud properties fromGOES/ABI along these trajectories (including neural network cloud morphology labels). The startpoints for the trajectories are EarthCARE overpasses over the southeast Pacific stratocumulus region. The trajectories are computed for 42 hours backwards and forwards from the EarthCARE overpass times.The cloud morphology and other imager (EarthCARE/MSI and GOES/ABI) variables are computed for 128km x 128km image chips (= scenes); the cloud microphysical variables from EarthCARE's active instruments are computed for 128 km along-track scenes (= 1D).The dataset also contains a variable indicating whether a closed-to-open cell transition was detected along the trajectory, and if so, the time of the transition.

links.title: EarthCARE Marine Stratocumulus Organization and Transition Dataset
EarthCARE Marine Stratocumulus Organization and Transition Dataset

data.title: Wind trajectories with GOES cloud morphology and EarthCARE microphysics for closed-to-open cell transitions

rain_rate_mean.description: The mean rain rate is computed per profile from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_rate variable. The mean of this 1D along-track mean rain rate is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored.

attrs.description: The mean rain rate is computed per profile from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_rate variable. The mean of this 1D along-track mean rain rate is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored.

rain_rate_subcloud.description: The subcloud rain rate is extracted from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_rate profiles by averaging the rain rate below the cloud base height per profile. The mean of this 1D along-track subcloud rain rate is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored.

attrs.description: The subcloud rain rate is extracted from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_rate profiles by averaging the rain rate below the cloud base height per profile. The mean of this 1D along-track subcloud rain rate is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored.

rain_rate_surface.description: The surface rain rate is defined as the rain rate at JSG_height=235 from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_rate profiles. The mean of this 1D along-track surface rain rate is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored. Warning: the rain rate is not very reliable close to the surface

attrs.description: The surface rain rate is defined as the rain rate at JSG_height=235 from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_rate profiles. The mean of this 1D along-track surface rain rate is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored. Warning: the rain rate is not very reliable close to the surface

rwc_cbh.description: The rain water content at cloud base height is extracted from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_water_content profiles. The mean of this 1D along-track rain water content at cloud base is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored.

attrs.long_name: Rain water content at cloud base
attrs.description: The rain water content at cloud base height is extracted from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_water_content profiles. The mean of this 1D along-track rain water content at cloud base is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored.

rwc_cbh_median.description: The rain water content at cloud base height is extracted from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_water_content profiles. The median of this 1D along-track rain water content at cloud base is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored.

attrs.long_name: Median of rain water content at cloud base
attrs.description: The rain water content at cloud base height is extracted from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_water_content profiles. The median of this 1D along-track rain water content at cloud base is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored.

rwc_cbh_perc05.description: The rain water content at cloud base height is extracted from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_water_content profiles. The 5th percentile of this 1D along-track rain water content at cloud base is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored.

attrs.long_name: 5th percentile of rain water content at cloud base
attrs.description: The rain water content at cloud base height is extracted from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_water_content profiles. The 5th percentile of this 1D along-track rain water content at cloud base is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored.

rwc_cbh_perc25.description: The rain water content at cloud base height is extracted from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_water_content profiles. The 25th percentile of this 1D along-track rain water content at cloud base is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored.

attrs.long_name: 25th percentile of rain water content at cloud base
attrs.description: The rain water content at cloud base height is extracted from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_water_content profiles. The 25th percentile of this 1D along-track rain water content at cloud base is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored.

rwc_cbh_perc75.description: The rain water content at cloud base height is extracted from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_water_content profiles. The 75th percentile of this 1D along-track rain water content at cloud base is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored.

attrs.long_name: 75th percentile of rain water content at cloud base
attrs.description: The rain water content at cloud base height is extracted from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_water_content profiles. The 75th percentile of this 1D along-track rain water content at cloud base is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored.

rwc_cbh_perc95.description: The rain water content at cloud base height is extracted from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_water_content profiles. The 95th percentile of this 1D along-track rain water content at cloud base is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored.

attrs.long_name: 95th percentile of rain water content at cloud base
attrs.description: The rain water content at cloud base height is extracted from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_water_content profiles. The 95th percentile of this 1D along-track rain water content at cloud base is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored.

rwc_cbh_std.description: The rain water content at cloud base height is extracted from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_water_content profiles. The standard deviation of this 1D along-track rain water content at cloud base is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored.

attrs.long_name: Standard deviation of rain water content at cloud base
attrs.description: The rain water content at cloud base height is extracted from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_water_content profiles. The standard deviation of this 1D along-track rain water content at cloud base is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored.

rwp.description: Reduction from ACM-CAP 2D profiles to 1D along-track RWP is done by summing over rain water content for each vertical profile. The mean of this 1D along-track RWP is then taken over the scene. Non-cloudy profiles are ignored (non-raining but cloudy profiles are taken into account for the average).

attrs.description: Reduction from ACM-CAP 2D profiles to 1D along-track RWP is done by summing over rain water content for each vertical profile. The mean of this 1D along-track RWP is then taken over the scene. Non-cloudy profiles are ignored (non-raining but cloudy profiles are taken into account for the average).

rwp_cv.description: coefficient of variation of rain water path

attrs.long_name: coefficient of variation of rain water path

The median of this 1D along-track RWP is then taken over the scene. Non-cloudy profiles are ignored (non-raining but cloudy profiles are taken into account for the average).

transition_datetime.description: Mean datetime at transition point (mean between last detected closed cell and first detected open cell along the trajectory).

attrs.description: Mean datetime at transition point (mean between last detected closed cell and first detected open cell along the trajectory).

transition_flag.description: Flag indicating whether a closed-to-open cell transition was detected along the trajectory. 0 = no transition detected, 1 = transition detected.

attrs.description: Flag indicating whether a closed-to-open cell transition was detected along the trajectory. 0 = no transition detected, 1 = transition detected.

transition_time_diff.description: Time difference from timestep=0 (EarthCARE overpass) to time of the closed-to-open cell transition (positive means transition is before overpass, negative means transition is after overpass).

attrs.description: Time difference from timestep=0 (EarthCARE overpass) to time of the closed-to-open cell transition (positive means transition is before overpass, negative means transition is after overpass).
attrs.long_name: Time difference between EarthCARE overpass and transition

transition_timestep.description: Timestep where transition from closed to open cells occurs (timestep of first open cell point)

attrs.description: Timestep where transition from closed to open cells occurs (timestep of first open cell point)

transition_uncertainty.description: Uncertainty in transition time (half the time between last closed and first open cell as detected by the GOES neural-network classifier).

attrs.description: Uncertainty in transition time (half the time between last closed and first open cell as detected by the GOES neural-network classifier).

title: Wind trajectories with GOES cloud morphology and EarthCARE microphysics for closed-to-open cell transitions
